all.en: Dear Ms. Chen, thank you for your interest in our enterprise platform.
all.zh: 親愛的陳小姐，感謝您對我們企業平台的關注。

all.en: We received your request for a formal price quotation last Friday.
all.zh: 我們上週五收到您正式的報價請求。

all.en: Based on the requirements you shared, we have prepared a tailored proposal.
all.zh: 根據您提供的需求，我們已準備一份客製化提案。

all.en: The quotation covers two hundred user licenses for the standard edition.
all.zh: 報價涵蓋標準版兩百個使用者授權。

all.en: The annual subscription is priced at one hundred eighty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 年度訂閱定價為十八萬美元。

all.en: This figure includes unlimited technical support during business hours.
all.zh: 此金額包含上班時間內的無限制技術支援。

all.en: Premium support with twenty four seven coverage is available as an add on.
all.zh: 全天候的高級支援可作為加購選項。

all.en: Onboarding services are quoted separately at twenty five thousand dollars.
all.zh: 導入服務另行報價為兩萬五千美元。

all.en: Implementation typically takes between six and eight weeks.
all.zh: 導入通常需六至八週時間。

all.en: A dedicated success manager will be assigned throughout the engagement.
all.zh: 整個合作期間將指派專屬客戶成功經理。

all.en: Volume discounts apply for orders exceeding three hundred licenses.
all.zh: 訂購超過三百個授權可享有量大折扣。

all.en: Multi year commitments unlock additional savings of up to fifteen percent.
all.zh: 多年承諾可解鎖最高百分之十五的額外節省。

all.en: Payment terms are net thirty days from invoice date.
all.zh: 付款條件為發票日後三十天內付清。

all.en: Prices quoted are valid for thirty days from the date of this letter.
all.zh: 本報價自函件日期起三十天內有效。

all.en: All figures exclude applicable taxes and any local regulatory fees.
all.zh: 所有金額皆未含適用稅金與任何在地法規費用。

all.en: A standard master service agreement will govern the engagement.
all.zh: 標準主服務合約將規範本次合作。

all.en: Custom legal terms can be reviewed by our contracts team upon request.
all.zh: 客製化法律條款可依請求由我方合約團隊審閱。

all.en: We are pleased to offer a free thirty day evaluation environment.
all.zh: 我們很樂意提供三十天免費評估環境。

all.en: Reference calls with similar customers can be arranged on request.
all.zh: 可依需求安排與類似客戶的參考訪談。

all.en: A detailed feature comparison sheet is enclosed for your reference.
all.zh: 詳細功能比較表附上供您參考。

all.en: Please let us know if any items require further clarification.
all.zh: 若有任何項目需要進一步釐清，請告知我們。

all.en: We would be happy to schedule a follow up call this week.
all.zh: 我們很樂意於本週安排後續通話。

all.en: Thank you again for considering our solution for your organization.
all.zh: 再次感謝您考慮我們的解決方案。

all.en: We look forward to building a long and successful partnership.
all.zh: 我們期待與您建立長久成功的合作關係。

all.en: Should you wish to proceed, kindly return the signed acceptance page via secure portal.
all.zh: 如欲進一步推進，敬請透過安全入口寄回簽妥的接受頁。

all.en: Our procurement onboarding team can assist with vendor registration in your systems.
all.zh: 我方採購對接團隊可協助於貴公司系統中完成供應商登錄。

all.en: We can also accommodate purchase order requirements unique to your accounting workflow.
all.zh: 我們亦可配合貴公司會計流程的特定採購單要求。

all.en: If a phased rollout is preferable, we are open to a tiered licensing schedule.
all.zh: 若分階段上線較為合適，我們也願意採分層授權時程安排。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will be hosted by your assigned customer success manager.
all.zh: 季度業務檢討將由您專屬的客戶成功經理主持。

all.en: Product training credits totaling forty hours are included at no additional cost.
all.zh: 免費附贈合計四十小時的產品訓練點數。

all.en: Your team will gain access to our private user community and quarterly roadmap previews.
all.zh: 貴團隊將獲得我方私人使用者社群及季度路線圖預覽的存取權限。

all.en: Please feel free to share this proposal with any additional stakeholders for review.
all.zh: 歡迎將本提案分享予其他相關利害關係人進行審閱。

all.en: We are committed to providing prompt responses to any technical or commercial inquiries.
all.zh: 我們承諾針對任何技術或商務詢問均迅速回覆。

all.en: Warm regards, Daniel Park, Senior Enterprise Account Director.
all.zh: 謹致，資深企業客戶總監 Daniel Park。

all.en: Optional professional services packages can be combined to fit your organizational needs.
all.zh: 選配的專業服務組合可彈性搭配以符合貴組織需求。

all.en: Custom integration with your existing identity provider is included at no extra charge.
all.zh: 與貴公司既有身分驗證提供者的客製化整合包含於報價內，不另收費。

all.en: Sandbox environments are available for testing prior to the production rollout.
all.zh: 正式上線前可使用沙箱環境進行測試。

all.en: Our security team can present compliance certifications during a dedicated review session.
all.zh: 本公司資安團隊可於專屬審查會議中說明合規認證。

all.en: A solution architect will be assigned to validate any custom workflow requirements.
all.zh: 將指派一位解決方案架構師協助驗證任何客製化流程需求。

all.en: Annual price adjustments are capped at 4 percent during the multi year term.
all.zh: 於多年合約期間，年度價格調整上限為百分之四。

all.en: Procurement contacts may request copies of our standard W-9 and banking details directly.
all.zh: 採購聯絡人可直接索取本公司標準 W-9 表單及銀行資訊副本。

all.en: Account executives are available for live walkthroughs of the pricing components.
all.zh: 客戶經理可安排即時逐項說明各項定價組成。

all.en: We are happy to revise this quotation should your scope or timeline evolve.
all.zh: 若貴公司範疇或時程有變動，我們亦樂意調整本報價。

all.en: Please contact our office at any time should you require additional information.
all.zh: 如需任何進一步資訊，敬請隨時與本辦公室聯繫。
